message:
feat(engine): add 183 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Twentieth batch of enrichment tests:

- spectral_fleet_convergence: 52 tests (graph topology, Laplacian,
  spectral analysis, convergence certificates, fleet diagnostics)
- stage_envelope_certificate: 33 tests (execution stages, latency
  percentiles, envelope certificates, budget compliance)
- stdlib_workload_verification: 32 tests (workload classification,
  verification campaigns, conformance checks, evidence binding)
- succinct_witness_compiler: 34 tests (witness compilation, proof
  compression, verification circuits, succinct proofs)
- supervision: 32 tests (supervisor trees, child processes, restart
  strategies, failure escalation, health monitoring)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
